title: Voidflare Galaxy Skybox
description:
🌌 1.21+ Voidflare Galaxy Skybox

Perfect for Bed Wars, SkyWars, and any competitive mode
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8f4005fdb8a3a330680ff56571faebdf500a031.png)🌌 Voidflare Galaxy PvP Skybox

Fight under a glowing nebula and distant stars with this clean, galaxy-themed skybox. Designed for PvP — no sun glare, no visual clutter, just deep space vibes and full focus.

Perfect for Bed Wars, SkyWars, and any competitive mode where clean skies matter.

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

🔧 Requires:                                  

[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) OR [Optiboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/optiboxes) OR [Nuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit) OR Any other mod that Suports Custom Skys


**ALSO ON** **[CruseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/red-voidflare-galaxy-skybox)**
